articles.summary: A 20-year-old undergraduate student was discovered deceased in Sankey Tank on Tuesday morning. Police suspect suicide after the student sent a message indicating intent to end her life.

articles.title: Gold price today: Spot gold hits one-week low, slips to $4,100 per ounce
articles.summary: Gold prices extended their losses, falling to their lowest level in nearly a week as a stronger US dollar and higher crude oil prices dampened investor appetite for the safe-haven metal. Spot gold eased 0.1% to $4,100.32 per ounce by 0107 GMT after touching its weakest level since July 2 earlier in the session, while US gold futures for August delivery dropped 1.1% to $4,112.50 per ounce.

articles.title: Stock market today: Will NSE Nifty50 and BSE Sensex shake off Tuesday's losses?
articles.summary: Global markets opened Wednesday on a cautious note as renewed geopolitical tensions in the Middle East pushed oil prices higher, while Asian equities showed resilience after an initial volatility. The MSCI Asia Pacific Index was little changed after briefly falling nearly 1% at the open, while US equity futures pointed to a stable start, with S&P 500 futures edging up 0.1% and Nasdaq 100 futures gaining 0.3%.

articles.title: Karnataka school holiday: Schools, colleges shut in Hosanagar and Sagar taluks of Shivamogga due to heavy rain
articles.summary: Schools and colleges in Hosanagar and Sagar taluks of Karnataka's Shivamogga district will remain closed on July 8 due to heavy rainfall. The holiday, announced as a precautionary measure, also applies to anganwadi centres and PU colleges.

articles.title: Mumbai schools reopen on July 8 as IMD downgrades weather alert; no fresh holiday announced by BMC
articles.summary: Mumbai schools are set to reopen on July 8 as the Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC) has not announced any fresh holiday following two days of rain-related closures. The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has downgraded Mumbai's weather warning from an Orange Alert to a Yellow Alert, signalling improved conditions.

articles.title: UDISE+ 2025-26 report records sharp fall in school dropout rates as teacher strength surpasses 1.02 crore nationwide
articles.summary: The UDISE+ 2025-26 report by the Ministry of Education recorded a sharp decline in school dropout rates, with preparatory-level dropouts falling to 1.8% and secondary-level dropouts to 7%. Student retention improved at middle and secondary stages, while showing a marginal decline at foundational and preparatory levels.

articles.title: ‘Some debts aren’t financial’: Microsoft engineer earning ₹1.9 crore says father sold mother’s jewellery for his education
articles.summary: Manu Agrawal's father sold his mother's jewelry to fund his college education. He later achieved significant success in the software engineering field.
